MV.FYM SAPPHIRA 28.5K/02 GEARED OPEN TANGA 9-18 DEC 2025

++++++++++
MV.FYM SAPPHIRA
EX NAME: M/V MOUNT ADAMS 
TYPE: SINGLE DECK SELF-TRIMMING LOG/BULK CARRIER 
CLASS: NK

SUMMER DEADWEIGHT/DRAFT/TPC: 28,487.51MT/9.767M/39.37MT

GRAIN/BALE (CBM): 37,732/36,683

ECO SPEED
LADEN - ABOUT 11.5 KNOTS ON ABOUT 15.5MT IFO + 0.1MT MGO 
BALLAST - ABOUT 12.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT 15.5MT IFO + 0.1MT MGO 
IN PORT: IDLE ABOUT 2.8MT IFO + 0.1MT MGO 
WORKING 24 HOURS ABOUT 5.0MT IFO + 0.1MT MGO
STRICTLY NO COMINGLING OF BUNKERS PERMITTED UNLESS OTHERWISE EXPRESSLY
ALLOWED BY HEAD OWNERS. 
OWNERS BUNKER SPECS TO ALWAYS APPLY, UNLESS OTHERWISE EXPRESSLY PERMITTED BY
HEAD OWNERS 
IFO SPECS: RMG380 ISO 8217:2010 MAX 0.5% SULPHUR M/M 
MGO SPECS: DMA ISO 8217:2010 MAX 0.1% SULPHUR M/M 
THE WORD "ABT" IN SPEED AND CONSUMPTION REFERS TO AN ALLOWANCE OF MINUS
0.5KNTS ON SPEED AND PLUS 5% ON BUNKER CONSUMPTION RESPECTIVELY BOTH IN
OWNERS FAVOR. 
THE AFORESAID SPEED/CONSUMPTION ARE BASIS GOOD WEATHER/SMOOTH SEA, UP TO MAX
BF SC 4/DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 (MAX 1,25M WAVE HEIGHT), NO ADVERSE CURRENTS, NO
NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL, AT THE CONDITION OF CLEAN BOTTOM IN OPEN, CALM
AND DEEP-SEA CONDITION WITH MINIMUM 24 HRS. STEAMING TIME. ANY GAIN ON TIME
AND/OR CONSUMPTION TO BE OFF-SET AGAINST LOSS ON TIME AND/OR CONSUMPTION IF
ANY. 
NO FAVORABLE WEATHER AND CURRENT FACTOR TO BE APPLIED WHEN EVALUATING
VESSEL'S PERFORMANCE. NO EXTRAPOLATION. 'GOOD WEATHER' PERIODS TO BE
CONSIDERED PERIODS NOT SHORTER THAN 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS FROM NOON TO NOON. 
VESSEL SHALL HAVE LIBERTY OF USING ADDITIONAL FUEL OIL/LSMGO WHILST ENTERING
AND LEAVING PORTS AND FOR EXCHANGE OF BALLAST, MANEUVERING IN SHALLOW
WATERS, CHANNELS AND NARROW WATERWAYS, HOLD CLEANING OPERATIONS, POOR
VISIBILITY, HEAVY TRAFFIC, WORKING WITH LOW LOAD, FREQUENT LOAD CHANGE,
INCINERATOR, SHIFT OF GENERATOR ENGINES.
ADA
 

PLSD TO HEAR.
